Base directory for this skill: /Users/zacjones/Documents/02.Areas/wodsmith/thewodapp-2/.claude/skills/team-memory

# Team Memory

Manage a shared team memory system backed by a Cloudflare Worker with semantic search.

## Commands

### /remember — Store an observation

Save a new observation to team memory.

```bash
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/remember.ts "<observation text>" [--category=<category>] [--priority=<priority>]
```

**Categories:** `convention`, `gotcha`, `debugging`, `architecture`, `workflow`
**Priorities:** `critical`, `moderate`, `ephemeral`

Defaults: category=convention, priority=moderate

Examples:
```bash
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/remember.ts "PlanetScale returns strings for COUNT columns — always wrap with Number()" --category=gotcha --priority=critical
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/remember.ts "Use ULID for ID generation, not CUID2" --category=convention
```

### /recall — Search memories

Search team memory by semantic query.

```bash
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/recall.ts "<query>" [--limit=<n>] [--category=<category>] [--priority=<priority>]
```

Default limit: 5. Results are ranked by relevance.

Examples:
```bash
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/recall.ts "database migration patterns"
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/recall.ts "Stripe" --category=gotcha --limit=10
```

### /feedback — Rate a memory

Provide feedback on a memory's usefulness.

```bash
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/feedback.ts <observation-id> <signal> [--note="<reason>"]
```

**Signals:** `helpful`, `harmful`, `irrelevant`

Examples:
```bash
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/feedback.ts 01J5K3M2N7 helpful --note="Saved me from a production bug"
TEAM_MEMORY_URL=https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev bun run .claude/skills/team-memory/scripts/feedback.ts 01J5K3M2N7 irrelevant
```

## Environment

Production URL: `https://team-memory.zacjones93.workers.dev`

All commands below include the env var inline. If `TEAM_MEMORY_URL` is already set in your shell, the prefix is optional.

## Hooks

- **SessionStart**: Reminds the agent about the memory system and how to use /recall for task-relevant lookups
- **SessionEnd**: Reads transcript JSONL, extracts user/assistant messages, POSTs to `/sessions`
- **Export**: Syncs memories to MEMORY.md between `<!-- BEGIN TEAM-MEMORY -->` / `<!-- END TEAM-MEMORY -->` markers

## Team Memory Results (10)

- **[01KHVHP7YVCNMP86MZV3B8N4AM]** (gotcha/moderate, score: 0.90, candidate)
  competition_registrations.team_member_id points to the membership in the competition EVENT team (all registrants), NOT the athlete squad team (per-team). Easy to get wrong.

- **[01KHYSA26A65B1WDFMP0W2J1MW]** (architecture/moderate, score: 0.96, candidate)
  Manual registration repair requires: 1) athlete team, 2) event team membership, 3) athlete team membership (captain), 4) team invitation for partner, 5) competition_registration, 6) registration_answers, 7) update commerce_purchase to COMPLETED+payment_intent.

- **[01KJ25XCWHJ8CQBYESG50VGND9]** (architecture/critical, score: 1.00, candidate)
  inviteUserToTeamInternal in registration.ts no longer sends emails — email sending was extracted to sendPendingTeammateEmails() which queries the team_invitation table and sends competition team invite emails. Callers of registerForCompetition are responsible for calling sendPendingTeammateEmails afterward. In the Stripe checkout workflow this is a discrete step (send-teammate-invitations) to prevent duplicate emails on retry.

- **[01KHVHP77VBGXKW1SQD4BVBXPD]** (architecture/critical, score: 0.90, candidate)
  User signup creates: users row + personal team (teams row, is_personal_team=true) + team_memberships row as owner. getUserPersonalTeamId throws if personal team missing, breaking sign-in entirely.

- **[01KHVMPSG8HNPYT1XRYY4B06G1]** (gotcha/critical, score: 0.90, candidate)
  Direct SQL inserts into team_invitations do NOT send invitation emails. Email sending is triggered by application code (registerForCompetition), not DB triggers. Must run app script separately after manual SQL fixes.

- **[01KHT910WXBVFXYSV4EZF4TPFW]** (architecture/critical, score: 0.87, candidate)
  Every user signup creates a personal team (is_personal_team=true) + owner membership. Manual user INSERTs missing these cause getUserPersonalTeamId to throw, breaking sign-in entirely.

- **[01KHYVCBQJDPW5TWFAZ81003SA]** (architecture/critical, score: 0.97, candidate)
  Entitlement overrides are now baked into KV session data. getUserTeamsWithPermissions() in auth.ts queries teamEntitlementOverrideTable and merges feature/limit overrides into team.plan. After setTeamLimitOverride(), invalidateTeamMembersSessions() is called.

- **[01KHWKF6YT4RRRMDF4M9GVCWHG]** (gotcha/critical, score: 0.93, candidate)
  team-settings-fns.ts was using createId() from @paralleldrive/cuid2 instead of createTeamId() from @/db/schemas/common to generate team IDs. This produced IDs without the team_ prefix, which caused Zod validation failures downstream (e.g. waiver creation). Always use the prefixed ID generators from @/db/schemas/common.ts for entity creation (createTeamId, createWaiverId, etc.), never raw createId().

- **[01KHM051WK0GQVK73323HFCB8X]** (gotcha/critical, score: 0.66, candidate)
  Team memory extraction hooks can recursively nest, creating multi-level transcript-in-transcript structures; validate input depth before processing

- **[01KHM72XKNSPDDQ0GB7FMXP24G]** (gotcha/critical, score: 0.67, candidate)
  D1 batching must be conservative — 15 rows × 5 cols = 75 params, not 20 rows (100 params) — to stay under D1's 100-param hard limit

1→/**
     2→ * Registration Server Functions for TanStack Start
     3→ *
     4→ * This file uses top-level imports for server-only modules.
     5→ * Port of commerce.action.ts registration functions
     6→ *
     7→ * OBSERVABILITY:
     8→ * - All registration operations are logged with request context
     9→ * - Registration IDs, competition IDs, and payment info are tracked
    10→ * - Payment flow states (pending, completed, cancelled) are logged
    11→ */
    12→
    13→import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start"
    14→import { and, eq, isNull } from "drizzle-orm"
    15→import type Stripe from "stripe"
    16→import { z } from "zod"
    17→import { getDb } from "@/db"
    18→import {
    19→	COMMERCE_PAYMENT_STATUS,
    20→	COMMERCE_PRODUCT_TYPE,
    21→	COMMERCE_PURCHASE_STATUS,
    22→	commerceProductTable,
    23→	commercePurchaseTable,
    24→	competitionRegistrationAnswersTable,
    25→	competitionRegistrationQuestionsTable,
    26→	competitionRegistrationsTable,
    27→	competitionsTable,
    28→	scalingGroupsTable,
    29→	scalingLevelsTable,
    30→	teamInvitationTable,
    31→	teamMembershipTable,
    32→	teamTable,
    33→	userTable,
    34→	createCommerceProductId,
    35→	createCommercePurchaseId,
    36→} from "@/db/schema"
    37→import {
    38→	buildFeeConfig,
    39→	calculateCompetitionFees,
    40→	type FeeBreakdown,
    41→	getRegistrationFee,
    42→	type TeamFeeOverrides,
    43→} from "@/lib/commerce-stubs"
    44→import { getAppUrl } from "@/lib/env"
    45→import {
    46→	addRequestContextAttribute,
    47→	logEntityCreated,
    48→	logInfo,
    49→	logWarning,
    50→	updateRequestContext,
    51→} from "@/lib/logging"
    52→import {
    53→	notifyRegistrationConfirmed,
    54→	registerForCompetition,
    55→} from "@/lib/registration-stubs"
    56→import { getStripe } from "@/lib/stripe"
    57→import { requireVerifiedEmail } from "@/utils/auth"
    58→import {
    59→	DEFAULT_TIMEZONE,
    60→	hasDateStartedInTimezone,
    61→	isDeadlinePassedInTimezone,
    62→} from "@/utils/timezone-utils"
    63→import { getDivisionSpotsAvailableFn } from "./competition-divisions-fns"
    64→
    65→// ============================================================================
    66→// Input Schemas
    67→// ============================================================================
    68→
    69→const registrationItemSchema = z.object({
    70→	divisionId: z.string().min(1, "Division ID is required"),
    71→	teamName: z.string().optional(),
    72→	teammates: z
    73→		.array(
    74→			z.object({
    75→				email: z.string().email(),
    76→				firstName: z.string().optional(),
    77→				lastName: z.string().optional(),
    78→				affiliateName: z.string().max(255).optional(),
    79→			}),
    80→		)
    81→		.optional(),
    82→})
    83→
    84→const initiateRegistrationPaymentInputSchema = z.object({
    85→	competitionId: z.string().min(1, "Competition ID is required"),
    86→	// Multi-division support: array of division entries
    87→	items: z.array(registrationItemSchema).min(1, "At least one division is required"),
    88→	// Shared fields
    89→	affiliateName: z.string().max(255).optional(),
    90→	answers: z
    91→		.array(
    92→			z.object({
    93→				questionId: z.string().min(1),
    94→				answer: z.string().max(5000),
    95→			}),
    96→		)
    97→		.optional(),
    98→})
    99→
   100→const getRegistrationFeeBreakdownInputSchema = z.object({
   101→	competitionId: z.string().min(1, "Competition ID is required"),
   102→	divisionId: z.string().min(1, "Division ID is required"),
   103→})
   104→
   105→const getUserCompetitionRegistrationInputSchema = z.object({
   106→	competitionId: z.string().min(1, "Competition ID is required"),
   107→	userId: z.string().min(1, "User ID is required"),
   108→})
   109→
   110→// ============================================================================
   111→// Helper Functions
   112→// ============================================================================
   113→
   114→/**
   115→ * Validate that all required questions have answers
   116→ * Throws error if required questions are missing
   117→ */
   118→async function validateRequiredQuestions(
   119→	competitionId: string,
   120→	answers: Array<{ questionId: string; answer: string }> | undefined,
   121→): Promise<void> {
   122→	const db = getDb()
   123→
   124→	// Get all required questions for this competition
   125→	const requiredQuestions = await db
   126→		.select()
   127→		.from(competitionRegistrationQuestionsTable)
   128→		.where(
   129→			and(
   130→				eq(competitionRegistrationQuestionsTable.competitionId, competitionId),
   131→				eq(competitionRegistrationQuestionsTable.required, true),
   132→			),
   133→		)
   134→
   135→	if (requiredQuestions.length === 0) return
   136→
   137→	// Check each required question has an answer
   138→	const answerMap = new Map(answers?.map((a) => [a.questionId, a.answer]))
   139→
   140→	const missingQuestions = requiredQuestions.filter(
   141→		(q) => !answerMap.has(q.id) || !answerMap.get(q.id)?.trim(),
   142→	)
   143→
   144→	if (missingQuestions.length > 0) {
   145→		throw new Error(
   146→			`Please answer all required questions: ${missingQuestions.map((q) => q.label).join(", ")}`,
   147→		)
   148→	}
   149→}
   150→
   151→/**
   152→ * Store registration answers in the database
   153→ */
   154→async function storeRegistrationAnswers(
   155→	registrationId: string,
   156→	userId: string,
   157→	answers: Array<{ questionId: string; answer: string }> | undefined,
   158→): Promise<void> {
   159→	if (!answers || answers.length === 0) return
   160→
   161→	const db = getDb()
   162→
   163→	// Insert all answers in a single batch
   164→	await db.insert(competitionRegistrationAnswersTable).values(
   165→		answers.map((answer) => ({
   166→			questionId: answer.questionId,
   167→			registrationId,
   168→			userId,
   169→			answer: answer.answer,
   170→		})),
   171→	)
   172→}
   173→
   174→// ============================================================================
   175→// Server Functions
   176→// ============================================================================
   177→
   178→/**
   179→ * Initiate payment for competition registration (supports multi-division)
   180→ *
   181→ * For FREE competitions ($0), creates registration directly.
   182→ * For PAID competitions, creates pending purchase(s) + Stripe Checkout Session.
   183→ * Registration is completed by webhook after payment succeeds.
   184→ *
   185→ * Supports registering for multiple divisions in a single checkout.
   186→ * Each division becomes a separate line item and purchase record.
   187→ */
   188→export const initiateRegistrationPaymentFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
   189→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
   190→		initiateRegistrationPaymentInputSchema.parse(data),
   191→	)
   192→	.handler(async ({ data: input }) => {
   193→		const session = await requireVerifiedEmail()
   194→		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized")
   195→
   196→		const db = getDb()
   197→		const userId = session.user.id
   198→
   199→		// Update request context with user and competition info
   200→		updateRequestContext({ userId })
   201→		addRequestContextAttribute("competitionId", input.competitionId)
   202→		addRequestContextAttribute("divisionCount", input.items.length.toString())
   203→
   204→		logInfo({
   205→			message: "[Registration] Payment initiation started",
   206→			attributes: {
   207→				competitionId: input.competitionId,
   208→				divisionCount: input.items.length,
   209→				divisionIds: input.items.map((i) => i.divisionId).join(","),
   210→			},
   211→		})
   212→
   213→		// 1. Get competition and validate
   214→		const competition = await db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
   215→			where: eq(competitionsTable.id, input.competitionId),
   216→		})
   217→		if (!competition) {
   218→			logWarning({
   219→				message: "[Registration] Competition not found",
   220→				attributes: { competitionId: input.competitionId },
   221→			})
   222→			throw new Error("Competition not found")
   223→		}
   224→
   225→		// 2. Validate registration window (using competition's timezone)
   226→		const competitionTimezone = competition.timezone || DEFAULT_TIMEZONE
   227→		if (
   228→			!hasDateStartedInTimezone(
   229→				competition.registrationOpensAt,
   230→				competitionTimezone,
   231→			)
   232→		) {
   233→			throw new Error("Registration has not opened yet")
   234→		}
   235→		if (
   236→			isDeadlinePassedInTimezone(
   237→				competition.registrationClosesAt,
   238→				competitionTimezone,
   239→			)
   240→		) {
   241→			throw new Error("Registration has closed")
   242→		}
   243→
   244→		// 3. Check not already registered for any of these divisions
   245→		for (const item of input.items) {
   246→			const existingRegistration =
   247→				await db.query.competitionRegistrationsTable.findFirst({
   248→					where: and(
   249→						eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, input.competitionId),
   250→						eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.userId, userId),
   251→						eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.divisionId, item.divisionId),
   252→					),
   253→				})
   254→			if (existingRegistration) {
   255→				const division = await db.query.scalingLevelsTable.findFirst({
   256→					where: eq(scalingLevelsTable.id, item.divisionId),
   257→				})
   258→				throw new Error(
   259→					`You are already registered for ${division?.label ?? "this division"}`,
   260→				)
   261→			}
   262→		}
   263→
   264→		// 3.5. Check division capacity for all items
   265→		for (const item of input.items) {
   266→			const capacityCheck = await getDivisionSpotsAvailableFn({
   267→				data: {
   268→					competitionId: input.competitionId,
   269→					divisionId: item.divisionId,
   270→				},
   271→			})
   272→			if (capacityCheck.isFull) {
   273→				const division = await db.query.scalingLevelsTable.findFirst({
   274→					where: eq(scalingLevelsTable.id, item.divisionId),
   275→				})
   276→				throw new Error(
   277→					`${division?.label ?? "This division"} is full. Please select a different division.`,
   278→				)
   279→			}
   280→		}
   281→
   282→		// 3.6. Validate required questions have answers
   283→		await validateRequiredQuestions(input.competitionId, input.answers)
   284→
   285→		// 4. Get registration fee for each division
   286→		const itemFees = await Promise.all(
   287→			input.items.map(async (item) => ({
   288→				...item,
   289→				feeCents: await getRegistrationFee(
   290→					input.competitionId,
   291→					item.divisionId,
   292→				),
   293→			})),
   294→		)
   295→
   296→		const totalFeeCents = itemFees.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.feeCents, 0)
   297→		const allFree = totalFeeCents === 0
   298→
   299→		// 5. For paid items, verify organizer has Stripe connected
   300→		let teamFeeOverrides: TeamFeeOverrides | undefined
   301→		if (!allFree) {
   302→			const organizingTeam = await db.query.teamTable.findFirst({
   303→				where: eq(teamTable.id, competition.organizingTeamId),
   304→				columns: {
   305→					stripeAccountStatus: true,
   306→					organizerFeePercentage: true,
   307→					organizerFeeFixed: true,
   308→				},
   309→			})
   310→
   311→			if (organizingTeam?.stripeAccountStatus !== "VERIFIED") {
   312→				throw new Error(
   313→					"This competition is temporarily unable to accept paid registrations. " +
   314→						"Please contact the organizer.",
   315→				)
   316→			}
   317→
   318→			teamFeeOverrides = {
   319→				organizerFeePercentage: organizingTeam.organizerFeePercentage,
   320→				organizerFeeFixed: organizingTeam.organizerFeeFixed,
   321→			}
   322→		}
   323→
   324→		// 6. ALL FREE - create registrations directly
   325→		if (allFree) {
   326→			let firstRegistrationId: string | null = null
   327→
   328→			for (const item of input.items) {
   329→				const result = await registerForCompetition({
   330→					competitionId: input.competitionId,
   331→					userId,
   332→					divisionId: item.divisionId,
   333→					teamName: item.teamName,
   334→					affiliateName: input.affiliateName,
   335→					teammates: item.teammates,
   336→				})
   337→
   338→				if (!firstRegistrationId) {
   339→					firstRegistrationId = result.registrationId
   340→				}
   341→
   342→				// Mark as free registration
   343→				await db
   344→					.update(competitionRegistrationsTable)
   345→					.set({ paymentStatus: COMMERCE_PAYMENT_STATUS.FREE })
   346→					.where(eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.id, result.registrationId))
   347→
   348→				// Store registration answers (shared across all divisions)
   349→				await storeRegistrationAnswers(
   350→					result.registrationId,
   351→					userId,
   352→					input.answers,
   353→				)
   354→
   355→				// Send registration confirmation email
   356→				await notifyRegistrationConfirmed({
   357→					userId,
   358→					registrationId: result.registrationId,
   359→					competitionId: input.competitionId,
   360→					isPaid: false,
   361→				})
   362→
   363→				logEntityCreated({
   364→					entity: "registration",
   365→					id: result.registrationId,
   366→					parentEntity: "competition",
   367→					parentId: input.competitionId,
   368→					attributes: {
   369→						paymentStatus: "FREE",
   370→						divisionId: item.divisionId,
   371→					},
   372→				})
   373→			}
   374→
   375→			logInfo({
   376→				message: "[Registration] Free registration(s) completed",
   377→				attributes: {
   378→					competitionId: input.competitionId,
   379→					divisionCount: input.items.length,
   380→				},
   381→			})
   382→
   383→			return {
   384→				purchaseId: null,
   385→				checkoutUrl: null,
   386→				totalCents: 0,
   387→				isFree: true,
   388→				registrationId: firstRegistrationId,
   389→			}
   390→		}
   391→
   392→		// 7. PAID - Find or create product (idempotent)
   393→		let product = await db.query.commerceProductTable.findFirst({
   394→			where: and(
   395→				eq(
   396→					commerceProductTable.type,
   397→					COMMERCE_PRODUCT_TYPE.COMPETITION_REGISTRATION,
   398→				),
   399→				eq(commerceProductTable.resourceId, input.competitionId),
   400→			),
   401→		})
   402→
   403→		if (!product) {
   404→			const productId = createCommerceProductId()
   405→			await db.insert(commerceProductTable).values({
   406→				id: productId,
   407→				name: `Competition Registration - ${competition.name}`,
   408→				type: COMMERCE_PRODUCT_TYPE.COMPETITION_REGISTRATION,
   409→				resourceId: input.competitionId,
   410→				priceCents: 0, // Individual item prices vary per division
   411→			})
   412→			product = await db.query.commerceProductTable.findFirst({
   413→				where: eq(commerceProductTable.id, productId),
   414→			})
   415→		}
   416→
   417→		if (!product) {
   418→			throw new Error("Failed to get or create product")
   419→		}
   420→
   421→		// 8. Create purchase records and build line items for each division
   422→		const feeConfig = buildFeeConfig(competition, teamFeeOverrides)
   423→		const purchaseIds: string[] = []
   424→		const lineItems: Stripe.Checkout.SessionCreateParams.LineItem[] = []
   425→		let totalChargeCents = 0
   426→		let totalPlatformFeeCents = 0
   427→		let totalOrganizerNetCents = 0
   428→
   429→		// Process free items immediately, create purchases for paid items
   430→		for (const item of itemFees) {
   431→			if (item.feeCents === 0) {
   432→				// Register free division immediately
   433→				const result = await registerForCompetition({
   434→					competitionId: input.competitionId,
   435→					userId,
   436→					divisionId: item.divisionId,
   437→					teamName: item.teamName,
   438→					affiliateName: input.affiliateName,
   439→					teammates: item.teammates,
   440→				})
   441→
   442→				await db
   443→					.update(competitionRegistrationsTable)
   444→					.set({ paymentStatus: COMMERCE_PAYMENT_STATUS.FREE })
   445→					.where(eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.id, result.registrationId))
   446→
   447→				await storeRegistrationAnswers(
   448→					result.registrationId,
   449→					userId,
   450→					input.answers,
   451→				)
   452→
   453→				await notifyRegistrationConfirmed({
   454→					userId,
   455→					registrationId: result.registrationId,
   456→					competitionId: input.competitionId,
   457→					isPaid: false,
   458→				})
   459→
   460→				continue
   461→			}
   462→
   463→			// Paid division - create purchase record
   464→			const feeBreakdown = calculateCompetitionFees(item.feeCents, feeConfig)
   465→			const purchaseId = createCommercePurchaseId()
   466→			purchaseIds.push(purchaseId)
   467→
   468→			await db.insert(commercePurchaseTable).values({
   469→				id: purchaseId,
   470→				userId,
   471→				productId: product.id,
   472→				status: COMMERCE_PURCHASE_STATUS.PENDING,
   473→				competitionId: input.competitionId,
   474→				divisionId: item.divisionId,
   475→				totalCents: feeBreakdown.totalChargeCents,
   476→				platformFeeCents: feeBreakdown.platformFeeCents,
   477→				stripeFeeCents: feeBreakdown.stripeFeeCents,
   478→				organizerNetCents: feeBreakdown.organizerNetCents,
   479→				metadata: JSON.stringify({
   480→					teamName: item.teamName,
   481→					affiliateName: input.affiliateName,
   482→					teammates: item.teammates,
   483→					answers: input.answers,
   484→				}),
   485→			})
   486→
   487→			totalChargeCents += feeBreakdown.totalChargeCents
   488→			totalPlatformFeeCents += feeBreakdown.platformFeeCents
   489→			totalOrganizerNetCents += feeBreakdown.organizerNetCents
   490→
   491→			// Get division label for Stripe line item
   492→			const division = await db.query.scalingLevelsTable.findFirst({
   493→				where: eq(scalingLevelsTable.id, item.divisionId),
   494→			})
   495→
   496→			lineItems.push({
   497→				price_data: {
   498→					currency: "usd",
   499→					unit_amount: feeBreakdown.totalChargeCents,
   500→					product_data: {
   501→						name: `${competition.name} - ${division?.label ?? "Registration"}`,
   502→						description: "Competition Registration",
   503→					},
   504→				},
   505→				quantity: 1,
   506→			})
   507→		}
   508→
   509→		// If no paid items remain (all were free after splitting), return
   510→		if (purchaseIds.length === 0 || lineItems.length === 0) {
   511→			return {
   512→				purchaseId: null,
   513→				checkoutUrl: null,
   514→				totalCents: 0,
   515→				isFree: true,
   516→				registrationId: null,
   517→			}
   518→		}
   519→
   520→		// 9. Get organizing team's Stripe connection for payouts
   521→		const organizingTeam = await db.query.teamTable.findFirst({
   522→			where: eq(teamTable.id, competition.organizingTeamId),
   523→			columns: {
   524→				stripeConnectedAccountId: true,
   525→				stripeAccountStatus: true,
   526→			},
   527→		})
   528→
   529→		// 10. Create Stripe Checkout Session with multiple line items
   530→		const appUrl = getAppUrl()
   531→		const sessionParams: Stripe.Checkout.SessionCreateParams = {
   532→			mode: "payment",
   533→			payment_method_types: ["card"],
   534→			line_items: lineItems,
   535→			metadata: {
   536→				purchaseIds: purchaseIds.join(","),
   537→				userId,
   538→				competitionId: input.competitionId,
   539→				type: COMMERCE_PRODUCT_TYPE.COMPETITION_REGISTRATION,
   540→				multiDivision: purchaseIds.length > 1 ? "true" : "false",
   541→			},
   542→			success_url: `${appUrl}/compete/${competition.slug}/registered?session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}`,
   543→			cancel_url: `${appUrl}/compete/${competition.slug}/register?canceled=true`,
   544→			expires_at: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + 30 * 60,
   545→			customer_email: session.user.email ?? undefined,
   546→		}
   547→
   548→		// Add transfer_data if organizer has verified Stripe connection
   549→		if (
   550→			organizingTeam?.stripeConnectedAccountId &&
   551→			organizingTeam.stripeAccountStatus === "VERIFIED"
   552→		) {
   553→			const applicationFeeAmount = Math.max(
   554→				0,
   555→				totalChargeCents - totalOrganizerNetCents,
   556→			)
   557→
   558→			sessionParams.payment_intent_data = {
   559→				application_fee_amount: applicationFeeAmount,
   560→				transfer_data: {
   561→					destination: organizingTeam.stripeConnectedAccountId,
   562→				},
   563→			}
   564→		}
   565→
   566→		const checkoutSession =
   567→			await getStripe().checkout.sessions.create(sessionParams)
   568→
   569→		// 11. Update all purchases with Checkout Session ID
   570→		for (const purchaseId of purchaseIds) {
   571→			await db
   572→				.update(commercePurchaseTable)
   573→				.set({ stripeCheckoutSessionId: checkoutSession.id })
   574→				.where(eq(commercePurchaseTable.id, purchaseId))
   575→		}
   576→
   577→		logInfo({
   578→			message: "[Registration] Checkout session created",
   579→			attributes: {
   580→				purchaseIds: purchaseIds.join(","),
   581→				competitionId: input.competitionId,
   582→				lineItemCount: lineItems.length,
   583→				totalCents: totalChargeCents,
   584→				hasConnectedAccount: !!organizingTeam?.stripeConnectedAccountId,
   585→			},
   586→		})
   587→
   588→		return {
   589→			purchaseId: purchaseIds[0],
   590→			checkoutUrl: checkoutSession.url,
   591→			totalCents: totalChargeCents,
   592→			isFree: false,
   593→		}
   594→	})

   596→/**
   597→ * Get fee breakdown for a specific division (for display before payment)
   598→ */
   599→export const getRegistrationFeeBreakdownFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
   600→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
   601→		getRegistrationFeeBreakdownInputSchema.parse(data),
   602→	)
   603→	.handler(
   604→		async ({
   605→			data,
   606→		}): Promise<
   607→			| { isFree: true; totalCents: 0; registrationFeeCents: 0 }
   608→			| ({ isFree: false; registrationFeeCents: number } & FeeBreakdown)
   609→		> => {
   610→			const db = getDb()
   611→
   612→			const competition = await db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
   613→				where: eq(competitionsTable.id, data.competitionId),
   614→			})
   615→			if (!competition) throw new Error("Competition not found")
   616→
   617→			// Get per-division fee (falls back to competition default)
   618→			const registrationFeeCents = await getRegistrationFee(
   619→				data.competitionId,
   620→				data.divisionId,
   621→			)
   622→
   623→			if (registrationFeeCents === 0) {
   624→				return { isFree: true, totalCents: 0, registrationFeeCents: 0 }
   625→			}
   626→
   627→			// Get organizing team for fee overrides (founding organizers get special rates)
   628→			const organizingTeam = await db.query.teamTable.findFirst({
   629→				where: eq(teamTable.id, competition.organizingTeamId),
   630→				columns: {
   631→					organizerFeePercentage: true,
   632→					organizerFeeFixed: true,
   633→				},
   634→			})
   635→
   636→			const teamFeeOverrides: TeamFeeOverrides | undefined = organizingTeam
   637→				? {
   638→						organizerFeePercentage: organizingTeam.organizerFeePercentage,
   639→						organizerFeeFixed: organizingTeam.organizerFeeFixed,
   640→					}
   641→				: undefined
   642→
   643→			const feeConfig = buildFeeConfig(competition, teamFeeOverrides)
   644→			const breakdown = calculateCompetitionFees(
   645→				registrationFeeCents,
   646→				feeConfig,
   647→			)
   648→
   649→			return {
   650→				isFree: false,
   651→				...breakdown,
   652→			}
   653→		},
   654→	)

   774→
   775→const updateRegistrationAffiliateInputSchema = z.object({
   776→	registrationId: z.string().min(1, "Registration ID is required"),
   777→	userId: z.string().min(1, "User ID is required"),
   778→	affiliateName: z.string().max(255).nullable(),

   781→/**
   782→ * Update the affiliate for a registration
   783→ * Each team member can update their own affiliate
   784→ * Affiliates are stored per-user in metadata.affiliates[userId]
   785→ */
   786→export const updateRegistrationAffiliateFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
   787→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
   788→		updateRegistrationAffiliateInputSchema.parse(data),
   789→	)
   790→	.handler(async ({ data: input }) => {
   791→		const session = await requireVerifiedEmail()
   792→		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized")
   793→
   794→		// Validate user ID matches session
   795→		if (input.userId !== session.user.id) {
   796→			throw new Error("You can only update your own affiliate")
   797→		}
   798→
   799→		const db = getDb()
   800→
   801→		// Get the registration
   802→		const registration = await db.query.competitionRegistrationsTable.findFirst(
   803→			{
   804→				where: eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.id, input.registrationId),
   805→			},
   806→		)
   807→
   808→		if (!registration) {
   809→			throw new Error("Registration not found")
   810→		}
   811→
   812→		// For individual registrations, user must be the registered user
   813→		// For team registrations, user must be a member of the athlete team
   814→		const isRegisteredUser = registration.userId === input.userId
   815→		let isTeamMember = false
   816→
   817→		if (registration.athleteTeamId) {
   818→			const membership = await db.query.teamMembershipTable.findFirst({
   819→				where: and(
   820→					eq(teamMembershipTable.teamId, registration.athleteTeamId),
   821→					eq(teamMembershipTable.userId, input.userId),
   822→				),
   823→			})
   824→			isTeamMember = !!membership
   825→		}
   826→
   827→		if (!isRegisteredUser && !isTeamMember) {
   828→			throw new Error("You must be a team member to update your affiliate")
   829→		}
   830→
   831→		// Parse existing metadata
   832→		let metadata: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   833→		if (registration.metadata) {
   834→			try {
   835→				metadata = JSON.parse(registration.metadata) as Record<string, unknown>
   836→			} catch {
   837→				metadata = {}
   838→			}
   839→		}
   840→
   841→		// Ensure affiliates object exists
   842→		if (!metadata.affiliates || typeof metadata.affiliates !== "object") {

   845→		const affiliates = metadata.affiliates as Record<string, string | null>
   846→
   847→		// Update this user's affiliate

   859→		// Save updated metadata

   869→		return { success: true }

   904→		if (!registration) {

   921→		// If no athleteTeamId, this is an individual registration

  1032→	// Competition info

  1035→		name: string

  1044→		label: string
  1045→		teamSize: number

  1047→		feeCents: number | null

  1049→	// Purchase/Payment info

  1052→		totalCents: number

  1058→
  1059→/**
  1060→ * Get detailed registration information including payment and competition details
  1061→ */
  1062→export const getRegistrationDetailsFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
  1063→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
  1064→		z.object({ registrationId: z.string() }).parse(data),
  1065→	)
  1066→	.handler(async ({ data }): Promise<RegistrationDetails | null> => {
  1067→		const session = await requireVerifiedEmail()
  1068→		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized")
  1069→
  1070→		const db = getDb()
  1071→		const { competitionDivisionsTable } = await import("@/db/schema")
  1072→
  1073→		// Get registration with all related data
  1074→		const registration = await db.query.competitionRegistrationsTable.findFirst(
  1075→			{
  1076→				where: eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.id, data.registrationId),
  1077→				with: {
  1078→					competition: {
  1079→						columns: {
  1080→							id: true,
  1081→							name: true,
  1082→							slug: true,
  1083→							startDate: true,
  1084→							endDate: true,
  1085→							profileImageUrl: true,
  1086→						},
  1087→					},
  1088→					division: {
  1089→						columns: {
  1090→							id: true,
  1091→							label: true,
  1092→							teamSize: true,
  1093→						},
  1094→					},
  1095→				},
  1096→			},
  1097→		)
  1098→
  1099→		if (!registration) {
  1100→			return null
  1101→		}
  1102→
  1103→		// Verify user is authorized to view this registration
  1104→		const isRegisteredUser = registration.userId === session.user.id
  1105→		let isTeamMember = false
  1106→		if (registration.athleteTeamId) {
  1107→			const membership = await db.query.teamMembershipTable.findFirst({
  1108→				where: and(
  1109→					eq(teamMembershipTable.teamId, registration.athleteTeamId),
  1110→					eq(teamMembershipTable.userId, session.user.id),
  1111→				),
  1112→			})
  1113→			isTeamMember = !!membership
  1114→		}
  1115→		if (!isRegisteredUser && !isTeamMember) {
  1116→			// Return null instead of throwing to allow route to show 404
  1117→			return null
  1118→		}
  1119→
  1120→		// Parse related data (handle array vs single object)
  1121→		const competition = registration.competition
  1122→			? Array.isArray(registration.competition)
  1123→				? registration.competition[0]
  1124→				: registration.competition
  1125→			: null
  1126→
  1127→		const division = registration.division
  1128→			? Array.isArray(registration.division)
  1129→				? registration.division[0]
  1130→				: registration.division
  1131→			: null
  1132→
  1133→		// Get division description and fee from competition_divisions table
  1134→		let divisionDescription: string | null = null
  1135→		let divisionFeeCents: number | null = null
  1136→
  1137→		if (competition?.id && division?.id) {
  1138→			const divisionConfig = await db.query.competitionDivisionsTable.findFirst(
  1139→				{
  1140→					where: and(
  1141→						eq(competitionDivisionsTable.competitionId, competition.id),
  1142→						eq(competitionDivisionsTable.divisionId, division.id),
  1143→					),
  1144→				},
  1145→			)
  1146→			if (divisionConfig) {
  1147→				divisionDescription = divisionConfig.description
  1148→				divisionFeeCents = divisionConfig.feeCents
  1149→			}
  1150→		}
  1151→
  1152→		// Get purchase details if exists
  1153→		let purchase: RegistrationDetails["purchase"] = null
  1154→
  1155→		if (registration.commercePurchaseId) {
  1156→			const purchaseRecord = await db.query.commercePurchaseTable.findFirst({
  1157→				where: eq(commercePurchaseTable.id, registration.commercePurchaseId),
  1158→			})
  1159→			if (purchaseRecord) {
  1160→				purchase = {
  1161→					id: purchaseRecord.id,
  1162→					totalCents: purchaseRecord.totalCents,
  1163→					status: purchaseRecord.status,
  1164→					completedAt: purchaseRecord.completedAt,
  1165→					stripePaymentIntentId: purchaseRecord.stripePaymentIntentId,
  1166→				}
  1167→			}
  1168→		}
  1169→
  1170→		return {
  1171→			registrationId: registration.id,
  1172→			registeredAt: registration.registeredAt,
  1173→			teamName: registration.teamName,
  1174→			paymentStatus: registration.paymentStatus,
  1175→			paidAt: registration.paidAt,
  1176→			competition: competition
  1177→				? {
  1178→						id: competition.id,
  1179→						name: competition.name,
  1180→						slug: competition.slug,
  1181→						startDate: competition.startDate,
  1182→						endDate: competition.endDate,
  1183→						profileImageUrl: competition.profileImageUrl,
  1184→					}
  1185→				: null,
  1186→			division: division
  1187→				? {
  1188→						id: division.id,
  1189→						label: division.label,
  1190→						teamSize: division.teamSize,
  1191→						description: divisionDescription,
  1192→						feeCents: divisionFeeCents,
  1193→					}
  1194→				: null,
  1195→			purchase,
  1196→		}
  1197→	})
  1198→
  1199→/**
  1200→ * Cancel any pending purchases for a user/competition
  1201→ * Used when user explicitly cancels from Stripe checkout
  1202→ * This releases the reservation immediately instead of waiting for timeout
  1203→ */
  1204→export const cancelPendingPurchaseFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
  1205→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
  1206→		z
  1207→			.object({
  1208→				userId: z.string().min(1, "User ID is required"),
  1209→				competitionId: z.string().min(1, "Competition ID is required"),
  1210→			})
  1211→			.parse(data),
  1212→	)
  1213→	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
  1214→		// Authenticate user
  1215→		const session = await requireVerifiedEmail()
  1216→		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized")
  1217→
  1218→		// Update request context
  1219→		updateRequestContext({ userId: session.user.id })
  1220→		addRequestContextAttribute("competitionId", data.competitionId)
  1221→
  1222→		// Ensure user can only cancel their own pending purchases
  1223→		if (data.userId !== session.user.id) {
  1224→			logWarning({
  1225→				message: "[Registration] Cancel purchase denied - wrong user",
  1226→				attributes: {
  1227→					requestedUserId: data.userId,
  1228→					competitionId: data.competitionId,
  1229→				},
  1230→			})
  1231→			throw new Error("You can only cancel your own pending purchases")
  1232→		}
  1233→
  1234→		const db = getDb()
  1235→
  1236→		// Cancel any PENDING purchases for this user/competition
  1237→		await db
  1238→			.update(commercePurchaseTable)
  1239→			.set({ status: COMMERCE_PURCHASE_STATUS.CANCELLED })
  1240→			.where(
  1241→				and(
  1242→					eq(commercePurchaseTable.userId, data.userId),
  1243→					eq(commercePurchaseTable.competitionId, data.competitionId),
  1244→					eq(commercePurchaseTable.status, COMMERCE_PURCHASE_STATUS.PENDING),
  1245→				),
  1246→			)
  1247→
  1248→		logInfo({
  1249→			message: "[Registration] Pending purchase cancelled",
  1250→			attributes: {
  1251→				competitionId: data.competitionId,
  1252→			},
  1253→		})
  1254→
  1255→		return { success: true }
  1256→	})
  1257→

1→/**
     2→ * Competition Detail Server Functions for TanStack Start
     3→ *
     4→ * Additional server functions for the competition detail pages
     5→ * that complement the base competition-fns.ts
     6→ *
     7→ * These functions provide data for:
     8→ * - Competition detail layout (registration counts, user status, permissions)
     9→ * - Registration sidebar (user registration, volunteer status)
    10→ * - Pending team invitations
    11→ *
    12→ * Note: Additional data like divisions, workouts, heats, and sponsors
    13→ * should be handled by separate dedicated server function files when needed.
    14→ */
    15→
    16→import { createServerFn } from "@tanstack/react-start"
    17→import { and, count, eq, inArray, isNull, sql } from "drizzle-orm"
    18→import { z } from "zod"
    19→import { getDb } from "@/db"
    20→import { addressesTable } from "@/db/schemas/addresses"
    21→import {
    22→	competitionRegistrationsTable,
    23→	competitionsTable,
    24→} from "@/db/schemas/competitions"
    25→import {
    26→	INVITATION_STATUS,
    27→	type InvitationStatus,
    28→	SYSTEM_ROLES_ENUM,
    29→	TEAM_PERMISSIONS,
    30→	teamInvitationTable,
    31→	teamMembershipTable,
    32→	teamRoleTable,
    33→	teamTable,
    34→} from "@/db/schemas/teams"
    35→import { ROLES_ENUM } from "@/db/schemas/users"
    36→import type { LaneShiftPattern } from "@/db/schemas/volunteers"
    37→import { getSessionFromCookie, requireVerifiedEmail } from "@/utils/auth"
    38→import {
    39→	DEFAULT_TIMEZONE,
    40→	hasDateStartedInTimezone,
    41→	isDeadlinePassedInTimezone,
    42→} from "@/utils/timezone-utils"
    43→
    44→// ============================================================================
    45→// Input Schemas
    46→// ============================================================================
    47→
    48→const getCompetitionRegistrationsInputSchema = z.object({
    49→	competitionId: z.string().min(1, "Competition ID is required"),
    50→})
    51→
    52→const getUserRegistrationInputSchema = z.object({
    53→	competitionId: z.string().min(1, "Competition ID is required"),
    54→	userId: z.string().min(1, "User ID is required"),
    55→})
    56→
    57→const getPendingTeamInvitesInputSchema = z.object({
    58→	competitionId: z.string().min(1, "Competition ID is required"),
    59→	userId: z.string().min(1, "User ID is required"),
    60→})
    61→
    62→const checkCanManageInputSchema = z.object({

    71→

    81→
    82→const updateCompetitionScoringConfigInputSchema = z.object({

    84→	scoringConfig: z.object({
    85→		algorithm: z.enum([
    86→			"traditional",
    87→			"p_score",
    88→			"winner_takes_more",
    89→			"online",

    91→		]),
    92→		traditional: z
    93→			.object({

    97→			.optional(),

    99→			.object({

   103→			.optional(),

   109→			.optional(),

   115→		statusHandling: z.object({

   123→const deleteCompetitionInputSchema = z.object({

   127→
   128→const getPendingTeammateInvitationsInputSchema = z.object({

   131→
   132→// ============================================================================
   133→// Permission Helpers
   134→// ============================================================================
   135→
   136→/**
   137→ * Require team permission or throw error
   138→ * Site admins bypass this check
   139→ */
   140→async function requireTeamPermission(
   141→	teamId: string,
   142→	permission: string,
   143→): Promise<void> {
   144→	const session = await getSessionFromCookie()
   145→	if (!session?.userId) {
   146→		throw new Error("Unauthorized")
   147→	}
   148→
   149→	// Site admins have all permissions
   150→	if (session.user?.role === ROLES_ENUM.ADMIN) return
   151→
   152→	const team = session.teams?.find((t) => t.id === teamId)
   153→	if (!team) {
   154→		throw new Error("Team not found")
   155→	}
   156→
   157→	if (!team.permissions.includes(permission)) {
   158→		throw new Error(`Missing required permission: ${permission}`)
   159→	}
   160→}
   161→
   162→// ============================================================================
   163→// Server Functions
   164→// ============================================================================
   165→
   166→/**
   167→ * Get a single competition by ID
   168→ * Used for the organizer layout route
   169→ */
   170→export const getCompetitionByIdFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
   171→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) => getCompetitionByIdInputSchema.parse(data))
   172→	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
   173→		const db = getDb()
   174→
   175→		const result = await db
   176→			.select({

   327→/**
   328→ * Get ALL of a user's registrations for a competition
   329→ * Checks both direct registrations (as captain) and team memberships
   330→ * Supports multi-division registration
   331→ */
   332→export const getUserCompetitionRegistrationsFn = createServerFn({
   333→	method: "GET",
   334→})
   335→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) => getUserRegistrationInputSchema.parse(data))
   336→	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
   337→		const db = getDb()
   338→
   339→		const registrationColumns = {
   340→			id: competitionRegistrationsTable.id,
   341→			eventId: competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId,
   342→			userId: competitionRegistrationsTable.userId,
   343→			divisionId: competitionRegistrationsTable.divisionId,
   344→			registeredAt: competitionRegistrationsTable.registeredAt,
   345→			teamName: competitionRegistrationsTable.teamName,
   346→			captainUserId: competitionRegistrationsTable.captainUserId,
   347→			athleteTeamId: competitionRegistrationsTable.athleteTeamId,
   348→			teamMemberId: competitionRegistrationsTable.teamMemberId,
   349→		}
   350→
   351→		// Get all direct registrations (as captain/individual)
   352→		const directRegistrations = await db
   353→			.select(registrationColumns)
   354→			.from(competitionRegistrationsTable)
   355→			.where(
   356→				and(
   357→					eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, data.competitionId),
   358→					eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.userId, data.userId),
   359→				),
   360→			)
   361→
   362→		// Check if user is a teammate on team registrations
   363→		const userTeamMemberships = await db
   364→			.select({ teamId: teamMembershipTable.teamId })
   365→			.from(teamMembershipTable)
   366→			.where(
   367→				and(
   368→					eq(teamMembershipTable.userId, data.userId),
   369→					eq(teamMembershipTable.isActive, true),
   370→				),
   371→			)
   372→
   373→		let teamRegistrations: typeof directRegistrations = []
   374→		if (userTeamMemberships.length > 0) {
   375→			const userTeamIds = userTeamMemberships.map((m) => m.teamId)
   376→
   377→			teamRegistrations = await db
   378→				.select(registrationColumns)
   379→				.from(competitionRegistrationsTable)
   380→				.where(
   381→					and(
   382→						eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, data.competitionId),
   383→						sql`${competitionRegistrationsTable.athleteTeamId} IN (${sql.join(
   384→							userTeamIds.map((id) => sql`${id}`),
   385→							sql`, `,
   386→						)})`,
   387→					),
   388→				)
   389→		}
   390→
   391→		// Merge and deduplicate (a captain appears in both direct and team sets)
   392→		const seenIds = new Set<string>()
   393→		const allRegistrations: typeof directRegistrations = []
   394→
   395→		for (const reg of [...directRegistrations, ...teamRegistrations]) {
   396→			if (!seenIds.has(reg.id)) {
   397→				seenIds.add(reg.id)
   398→				allRegistrations.push(reg)
   399→			}
   400→		}
   401→
   402→		return { registrations: allRegistrations }
   403→	})

   461→export const checkCanManageCompetitionFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })

   463→	.handler(async ({ data }) => {

   465→		const session = await getSessionFromCookie()
   466→		if (session?.user?.role === ROLES_ENUM.ADMIN) {
   467→			return { canManage: true }
   468→		}
   469→
   470→		const db = getDb()
   471→
   472→		// Check if user is a member of the organizing team
   473→		const membership = await db
   474→			.select({
   475→				id: teamMembershipTable.id,
   476→				roleId: teamMembershipTable.roleId,
   477→				isSystemRole: teamMembershipTable.isSystemRole,
   478→			})
   479→			.from(teamMembershipTable)
   480→			.where(
   481→				and(
   482→					eq(teamMembershipTable.teamId, data.organizingTeamId),

   484→					eq(teamMembershipTable.isActive, true),
   485→				),
   486→			)

   493→		// Check if user has admin or owner role

   532→/**
   533→ * Get registration status for a competition
   534→ * Returns whether registration is open, closed, or not yet open
   535→ * Uses timezone-aware date comparisons
   536→ */
   537→export const getRegistrationStatusFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
   538→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
   539→		z
   540→			.object({
   541→				registrationOpensAt: z.string().nullable(),
   542→				registrationClosesAt: z.string().nullable(),
   543→				timezone: z.string().optional(),
   544→			})
   545→			.parse(data),
   546→	)
   547→	.handler(async ({ data }) => {
   548→		const timezone = data.timezone || DEFAULT_TIMEZONE
   549→		const regOpensAt = data.registrationOpensAt
   550→		const regClosesAt = data.registrationClosesAt
   551→
   552→		// Use timezone-aware comparisons
   553→		const hasOpened = hasDateStartedInTimezone(regOpensAt, timezone)
   554→		const hasClosed = isDeadlinePassedInTimezone(regClosesAt, timezone)
   555→
   556→		const registrationOpen = !!(
   557→			regOpensAt &&
   558→			regClosesAt &&
   559→			hasOpened &&
   560→			!hasClosed
   561→		)
   562→		const registrationClosed = hasClosed
   563→		const registrationNotYetOpen = !!(regOpensAt && !hasOpened)
   564→
   565→		return {
   566→			registrationOpen,
   567→			registrationClosed,
   568→			registrationNotYetOpen,
   569→		}
   570→	})

   677→/**
   678→ * Get pending teammate invitations for a competition (not yet accepted).
   679→ * Includes invitations that have pending data from the guest form.
   680→ * Requires organizer permission on the competition.
   681→ */
   682→export const getPendingTeammateInvitationsFn = createServerFn({ method: "GET" })
   683→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
   684→		getPendingTeammateInvitationsInputSchema.parse(data),
   685→	)
   686→	.handler(
   687→		async ({ data }): Promise<{ pendingInvites: PendingTeammateInvite[] }> => {
   688→			const db = getDb()
   689→
   690→			// Get competition to find organizing team
   691→			const competition = await db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
   692→				where: eq(competitionsTable.id, data.competitionId),
   693→				columns: { organizingTeamId: true },
   694→			})
   695→
   696→			if (!competition) {
   697→				throw new Error("Competition not found")
   698→			}
   699→
   700→			// Require permission to manage this competition's team
   701→			await requireTeamPermission(
   702→				competition.organizingTeamId,
   703→				TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_COMPETITIONS,
   704→			)
   705→
   706→			// Get all registrations for this competition to find their athlete teams
   707→			const registrations =
   708→				await db.query.competitionRegistrationsTable.findMany({
   709→					where: eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, data.competitionId),
   710→					columns: {
   711→						id: true,
   712→						athleteTeamId: true,
   713→						pendingTeammates: true,
   714→					},
   715→				})
   716→
   717→			if (registrations.length === 0) {
   718→				return { pendingInvites: [] }
   719→			}
   720→
   721→			const athleteTeamIds = registrations
   722→				.map((r) => r.athleteTeamId)
   723→				.filter((id): id is string => id !== null)
   724→
   725→			if (athleteTeamIds.length === 0) {
   726→				return { pendingInvites: [] }
   727→			}
   728→
   729→			// Create maps for registration data
   730→			const teamToRegistration = new Map<string, string>()
   731→			// Map of "teamId-email" -> teammate name from captain's registration
   732→			const teammateNames = new Map<string, string>()
   733→
   734→			for (const reg of registrations) {
   735→				if (reg.athleteTeamId) {
   736→					teamToRegistration.set(reg.athleteTeamId, reg.id)
   737→
   738→					// Parse pendingTeammates to get names entered by captain
   739→					if (reg.pendingTeammates) {
   740→						try {
   741→							const teammates = JSON.parse(reg.pendingTeammates) as Array<{
   742→								email: string
   743→								firstName?: string
   744→								lastName?: string
   745→							}>
   746→							for (const tm of teammates) {
   747→								const name = [tm.firstName, tm.lastName]
   748→									.filter(Boolean)
   749→									.join(" ")
   750→									.trim()
   751→								if (name && tm.email) {
   752→									teammateNames.set(
   753→										`${reg.athleteTeamId}-${tm.email.toLowerCase()}`,
   754→										name,
   755→									)
   756→								}
   757→							}
   758→						} catch {
   759→							// Invalid JSON, ignore
   760→						}
   761→					}
   762→				}
   763→			}
   764→
   765→			// Get invitations for these athlete teams that haven't been claimed by a user
   766→			// Include both 'pending' and 'accepted' status (accepted = guest submitted form without account)
   767→			// Exclude those with acceptedAt set (user with account has claimed the invite)
   768→			const allInvitations = await db.query.teamInvitationTable.findMany({
   769→				where: and(
   770→					inArray(teamInvitationTable.teamId, athleteTeamIds),
   771→					eq(teamInvitationTable.roleId, SYSTEM_ROLES_ENUM.MEMBER),
   772→					isNull(teamInvitationTable.acceptedAt), // Not yet claimed by user with account
   773→				),
   774→				columns: {
   775→					id: true,
   776→					email: true,
   777→					teamId: true,
   778→					status: true,
   779→					metadata: true,
   780→					createdAt: true,
   781→				},
   782→			})
   783→
   784→			const pendingInvites: PendingTeammateInvite[] = allInvitations.map(
   785→				(inv) => {
   786→					// Parse metadata to check for pending data
   787→					let pendingAnswers: PendingTeammateInvite["pendingAnswers"]
   788→					let pendingSignatures: PendingTeammateInvite["pendingSignatures"]
   789→					let submittedAt: string | undefined
   790→
   791→					if (inv.metadata) {
   792→						try {
   793→							const meta = JSON.parse(inv.metadata) as Record<string, unknown>
   794→							if (Array.isArray(meta.pendingAnswers)) {
   795→								pendingAnswers =
   796→									meta.pendingAnswers as PendingTeammateInvite["pendingAnswers"]
   797→							}
   798→							if (Array.isArray(meta.pendingSignatures)) {
   799→								pendingSignatures =
   800→									meta.pendingSignatures as PendingTeammateInvite["pendingSignatures"]
   801→							}
   802→							if (typeof meta.submittedAt === "string") {
   803→								submittedAt = meta.submittedAt
   804→							}
   805→						} catch {
   806→							// Invalid JSON, ignore
   807→						}
   808→					}
   809→
   810→					// Get teammate name from captain's registration (pendingTeammates)
   811→					const guestName = teammateNames.get(
   812→						`${inv.teamId}-${inv.email.toLowerCase()}`,
   813→					)
   814→
   815→					return {
   816→						id: inv.id,
   817→						email: inv.email,
   818→						athleteTeamId: inv.teamId,
   819→						registrationId: teamToRegistration.get(inv.teamId) || null,
   820→						status:
   821→							(inv.status as InvitationStatus) || INVITATION_STATUS.PENDING,
   822→						guestName,
   823→						pendingAnswers,
   824→						pendingSignatures,
   825→						submittedAt,
   826→						createdAt: inv.createdAt,
   827→					}
   828→				},
   829→			)
   830→
   831→			return { pendingInvites }
   832→		},
   833→	)
   834→
   835→/**
   836→ * Update competition rotation settings
   837→ */
   838→export const updateCompetitionRotationSettingsFn = createServerFn({
   839→	method: "POST",
   840→})
   841→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
   842→		updateCompetitionRotationSettingsInputSchema.parse(data),
   843→	)
   844→	.handler(async ({ data: input }) => {
   845→		const session = await requireVerifiedEmail()
   846→		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized")
   847→
   848→		const db = getDb()
   849→
   850→		// Verify user has permission to manage this competition
   851→		const competition = await db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
   852→			where: eq(competitionsTable.id, input.competitionId),
   853→		})
   854→		if (!competition) throw new Error("Competition not found")
   855→
   856→		// Check permission
   857→		await requireTeamPermission(
   858→			competition.organizingTeamId,
   859→			TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_PROGRAMMING,
   860→		)
   861→
   862→		// Update competition
   863→		await db
   864→			.update(competitionsTable)
   865→			.set({
   866→				defaultHeatsPerRotation: input.defaultHeatsPerRotation,
   867→				defaultLaneShiftPattern: input.defaultLaneShiftPattern as
   868→					| LaneShiftPattern
   869→					| undefined,
   870→				updatedAt: new Date(),
   871→			})
   872→			.where(eq(competitionsTable.id, input.competitionId))
   873→
   874→		return { success: true }
   875→	})
   876→
   877→/**
   878→ * Update competition scoring configuration
   879→ */
   880→export const updateCompetitionScoringConfigFn = createServerFn({
   881→	method: "POST",
   882→})
   883→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) =>
   884→		updateCompetitionScoringConfigInputSchema.parse(data),
   885→	)
   886→	.handler(async ({ data: input }) => {
   887→		const session = await requireVerifiedEmail()
   888→		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized")
   889→
   890→		const db = getDb()
   891→
   892→		// Verify user has permission to manage this competition
   893→		const competition = await db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
   894→			where: eq(competitionsTable.id, input.competitionId),
   895→		})
   896→		if (!competition) throw new Error("Competition not found")
   897→
   898→		// Check permission
   899→		await requireTeamPermission(
   900→			competition.organizingTeamId,
   901→			TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_PROGRAMMING,
   902→		)
   903→
   904→		// Parse existing settings and merge with new scoring config
   905→		let existingSettings: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   906→		if (competition.settings) {
   907→			try {
   908→				existingSettings = JSON.parse(competition.settings)
   909→			} catch {
   910→				// Ignore parse errors
   911→			}
   912→		}
   913→
   914→		const newSettings = {
   915→			...existingSettings,
   916→			scoringConfig: input.scoringConfig,
   917→		}
   918→
   919→		// Update competition
   920→		await db
   921→			.update(competitionsTable)
   922→			.set({
   923→				settings: JSON.stringify(newSettings),
   924→				updatedAt: new Date(),
   925→			})
   926→			.where(eq(competitionsTable.id, input.competitionId))
   927→
   928→		return { success: true }
   929→	})
   930→
   931→/**
   932→ * Delete a competition
   933→ */
   934→export const deleteCompetitionFn = createServerFn({ method: "POST" })
   935→	.inputValidator((data: unknown) => deleteCompetitionInputSchema.parse(data))
   936→	.handler(async ({ data: input }) => {
   937→		const session = await requireVerifiedEmail()
   938→		if (!session) throw new Error("Unauthorized")
   939→
   940→		const db = getDb()
   941→
   942→		// Check permission
   943→		await requireTeamPermission(
   944→			input.organizingTeamId,
   945→			TEAM_PERMISSIONS.MANAGE_PROGRAMMING,
   946→		)
   947→
   948→		// Get the competition to verify it exists and get the competitionTeamId
   949→		const competition = await db.query.competitionsTable.findFirst({
   950→			where: eq(competitionsTable.id, input.competitionId),
   951→		})
   952→		if (!competition) throw new Error("Competition not found")
   953→
   954→		// Check for existing registrations
   955→		const registrations = await db
   956→			.select({ count: count() })
   957→			.from(competitionRegistrationsTable)
   958→			.where(eq(competitionRegistrationsTable.eventId, input.competitionId))
   959→
   960→		const registrationCount = registrations[0]?.count ?? 0
   961→		if (registrationCount > 0) {
   962→			throw new Error(
   963→				`Cannot delete competition with ${registrationCount} existing registration(s). Please remove registrations first.`,
   964→			)
   965→		}
   966→
   967→		// Delete the competition and clean up related records in a transaction
   968→		await db.transaction(async (tx) => {
   969→			// Delete the competition (will cascade delete registrations due to schema)
   970→			await tx
   971→				.delete(competitionsTable)
   972→				.where(eq(competitionsTable.id, input.competitionId))
   973→
   974→			// Clean up competition_event team related records before deleting the team
   975→			// These tables don't have onDelete cascade, so we must delete manually
   976→			await tx
   977→				.delete(teamMembershipTable)
   978→				.where(eq(teamMembershipTable.teamId, competition.competitionTeamId))
   979→
   980→			await tx
   981→				.delete(teamRoleTable)
   982→				.where(eq(teamRoleTable.teamId, competition.competitionTeamId))
   983→
   984→			await tx
   985→				.delete(teamInvitationTable)
   986→				.where(eq(teamInvitationTable.teamId, competition.competitionTeamId))
   987→
   988→			// Delete the competition_event team
   989→			await tx
   990→				.delete(teamTable)
   991→				.where(eq(teamTable.id, competition.competitionTeamId))
   992→		})
   993→
   994→		return { success: true }
   995→	})
   996→

1→import type { InferSelectModel } from "drizzle-orm"
     2→import { relations } from "drizzle-orm"
     3→import {
     4→	boolean,
     5→	index,
     6→	int,

    11→} from "drizzle-orm/mysql-core"
    12→import {
    13→	commonColumns,
    14→	createScalingGroupId,
    15→	createScalingLevelId,
    16→	createWorkoutScalingDescriptionId,
    17→} from "./common"
    18→import { teamTable } from "./teams"
    19→import { workouts } from "./workouts"
    20→
    21→// Scaling Groups table
    22→export const scalingGroupsTable = mysqlTable(
    23→	"scaling_groups",
    24→	{
    25→		...commonColumns,
    26→		id: varchar({ length: 255 })
    27→			.primaryKey()
    28→			.$defaultFn(() => createScalingGroupId())
    29→			.notNull(),
    30→		title: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
    31→		description: text(),
    32→		teamId: varchar({ length: 255 }), // Nullable for system groups
    33→		isDefault: boolean().default(false).notNull(),
    34→		isSystem: boolean().default(false).notNull(), // Marks global default group
    35→	},
    36→	(table) => [
    37→		index("scaling_groups_team_idx").on(table.teamId),
    38→		index("scaling_groups_default_idx").on(table.isDefault),
    39→		index("scaling_groups_system_idx").on(table.isSystem),
    40→	],
    41→)
    42→
    43→// Scaling Levels table
    44→export const scalingLevelsTable = mysqlTable(
    45→	"scaling_levels",
    46→	{
    47→		...commonColumns,
    48→		id: varchar({ length: 255 })
    49→			.primaryKey()
    50→			.$defaultFn(() => createScalingLevelId())
    51→			.notNull(),
    52→		scalingGroupId: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
    53→		label: varchar({ length: 100 }).notNull(),
    54→		position: int().notNull(), // 0 = hardest, increasing numbers = easier
    55→		teamSize: int().default(1).notNull(), // 1 = individual, 2+ = team
    56→	},
    57→	(table) => [
    58→		index("scaling_levels_group_idx").on(table.scalingGroupId),
    59→		index("scaling_levels_position_idx").on(
    60→			table.scalingGroupId,
    61→			table.position,
    62→		),
    63→	],
    64→)
    65→
    66→// Workout Scaling Descriptions table (optional descriptions for each scaling level in a workout)
    67→export const workoutScalingDescriptionsTable = mysqlTable(
    68→	"workout_scaling_descriptions",
    69→	{
    70→		...commonColumns,
    71→		id: varchar({ length: 255 })
    72→			.primaryKey()
    73→			.$defaultFn(() => createWorkoutScalingDescriptionId())
    74→			.notNull(),
    75→		workoutId: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
    76→		scalingLevelId: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
    77→		description: text(), // Optional workout-specific description for this scaling level
    78→	},
    79→	(table) => [
    80→		index("workout_scaling_desc_workout_idx").on(table.workoutId),
    81→		uniqueIndex("workout_scaling_desc_unique_idx").on(
    82→			table.workoutId,
    83→			table.scalingLevelId,
    84→		),
    85→	],
    86→)
    87→
    88→// Relations
    89→export const scalingGroupsRelations = relations(
    90→	scalingGroupsTable,
    91→	({ one, many }) => ({
    92→		team: one(teamTable, {
    93→			fields: [scalingGroupsTable.teamId],
    94→			references: [teamTable.id],
    95→		}),
    96→		scalingLevels: many(scalingLevelsTable),
    97→	}),
    98→)
    99→
   100→export const scalingLevelsRelations = relations(
   101→	scalingLevelsTable,
   102→	({ one, many }) => ({
   103→		scalingGroup: one(scalingGroupsTable, {
   104→			fields: [scalingLevelsTable.scalingGroupId],
   105→			references: [scalingGroupsTable.id],
   106→		}),
   107→		workoutDescriptions: many(workoutScalingDescriptionsTable),
   108→	}),
   109→)
   110→
   111→export const workoutScalingDescriptionsRelations = relations(
   112→	workoutScalingDescriptionsTable,
   113→	({ one }) => ({
   114→		workout: one(workouts, {
   115→			fields: [workoutScalingDescriptionsTable.workoutId],
   116→			references: [workouts.id],
   117→		}),
   118→		scalingLevel: one(scalingLevelsTable, {
   119→			fields: [workoutScalingDescriptionsTable.scalingLevelId],
   120→			references: [scalingLevelsTable.id],
   121→		}),
   122→	}),
   123→)
   124→
   125→// Type exports
   126→export type ScalingGroup = InferSelectModel<typeof scalingGroupsTable>
   127→export type ScalingLevel = InferSelectModel<typeof scalingLevelsTable>
   128→export type WorkoutScalingDescription = InferSelectModel<
   129→	typeof workoutScalingDescriptionsTable
   130→>
   131→
   132→// Global default scaling group ID constant
   133→export const GLOBAL_DEFAULT_SCALING_GROUP_ID = "sgrp_global_default"

1→import type { InferSelectModel } from "drizzle-orm"
     2→import { relations } from "drizzle-orm"
     3→import {
     4→	index,
     5→	int,
     6→	mysqlTable,

    10→	datetime,
    11→} from "drizzle-orm/mysql-core"
    12→import {
    13→	commonColumns,
    14→	createCommerceProductId,
    15→	createCommercePurchaseId,

    17→} from "./common"
    18→import { competitionsTable } from "./competitions"

    22→// Commerce product types

    24→	COMPETITION_REGISTRATION: "COMPETITION_REGISTRATION",
    25→	ADDON: "ADDON",
    26→} as const
    27→
    28→export type CommerceProductType =
    29→	(typeof COMMERCE_PRODUCT_TYPE)[keyof typeof COMMERCE_PRODUCT_TYPE]
    30→
    31→// Commerce purchase status
    32→export const COMMERCE_PURCHASE_STATUS = {
    33→	PENDING: "PENDING",
    34→	COMPLETED: "COMPLETED",
    35→	FAILED: "FAILED",
    36→	CANCELLED: "CANCELLED",
    37→} as const
    38→
    39→export type CommercePurchaseStatus =
    40→	(typeof COMMERCE_PURCHASE_STATUS)[keyof typeof COMMERCE_PURCHASE_STATUS]
    41→
    42→// Commerce payment status for registrations
    43→export const COMMERCE_PAYMENT_STATUS = {
    44→	FREE: "FREE",
    45→	PENDING_PAYMENT: "PENDING_PAYMENT",
    46→	PAID: "PAID",
    47→	FAILED: "FAILED",
    48→} as const
    49→
    50→export type CommercePaymentStatus =
    51→	(typeof COMMERCE_PAYMENT_STATUS)[keyof typeof COMMERCE_PAYMENT_STATUS]
    52→
    53→/**
    54→ * Commerce Product Table
    55→ * Represents purchasable products (competition registrations, add-ons, etc.)
    56→ */
    57→export const commerceProductTable = mysqlTable(
    58→	"commerce_products",
    59→	{
    60→		...commonColumns,
    61→		id: varchar({ length: 255 })
    62→			.primaryKey()
    63→			.$defaultFn(() => createCommerceProductId())
    64→			.notNull(),
    65→		// Product display name (e.g., "Competition Registration - Summer Throwdown 2025")
    66→		name: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
    67→		// Product type for categorization
    68→		type: varchar({ length: 50 }).$type<CommerceProductType>().notNull(),
    69→		// Reference to the resource (e.g., competitionId for registration products)
    70→		resourceId: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
    71→		// Base price in cents
    72→		priceCents: int().notNull(),
    73→	},
    74→	(table) => [
    75→		// Prevent duplicate products for the same resource
    76→		uniqueIndex("commerce_product_resource_idx").on(
    77→			table.type,
    78→			table.resourceId,
    79→		),
    80→	],
    81→)
    82→
    83→/**
    84→ * Commerce Purchase Table
    85→ * Records all purchase transactions
    86→ */
    87→export const commercePurchaseTable = mysqlTable(
    88→	"commerce_purchases",
    89→	{
    90→		...commonColumns,
    91→		id: varchar({ length: 255 })
    92→			.primaryKey()
    93→			.$defaultFn(() => createCommercePurchaseId())
    94→			.notNull(),
    95→		// The user making the purchase
    96→		userId: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
    97→		// The product being purchased
    98→		productId: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
    99→		// Purchase status
   100→		status: varchar({ length: 20 }).$type<CommercePurchaseStatus>().notNull(),
   101→
   102→		// Context for competition registrations (stored directly for efficient queries)
   103→		competitionId: varchar({ length: 255 }),
   104→		divisionId: varchar({ length: 255 }),
   105→
   106→		// Amounts (all in cents)
   107→		totalCents: int().notNull(), // Amount charged to customer
   108→		platformFeeCents: int().notNull(), // Wodsmith revenue
   109→		stripeFeeCents: int().notNull(), // Stripe's fee
   110→		organizerNetCents: int().notNull(), // What organizer receives
   111→
   112→		// Stripe references (using Checkout Sessions)
   113→		stripeCheckoutSessionId: varchar({ length: 255 }), // Checkout Session ID
   114→		stripePaymentIntentId: varchar({ length: 255 }), // Set after checkout completes (from session.payment_intent)
   115→
   116→		// Extensibility (JSON for team registration data, etc.)
   117→		metadata: text(), // JSON
   118→
   119→		// Completion timestamp
   120→		completedAt: datetime(),
   121→	},
   122→	(table) => [
   123→		index("commerce_purchase_user_idx").on(table.userId),
   124→		index("commerce_purchase_product_idx").on(table.productId),
   125→		index("commerce_purchase_status_idx").on(table.status),
   126→		index("commerce_purchase_stripe_session_idx").on(
   127→			table.stripeCheckoutSessionId,
   128→		),
   129→		index("commerce_purchase_competition_idx").on(table.competitionId),
   130→	],
   131→)
   132→
   133→/**
   134→ * Competition Divisions Table
   135→ * Stores per-division configuration for competitions including fees and descriptions
   136→ * (e.g., Individual RX: $200 - "Athletes who can perform movements as prescribed")
   137→ */
   138→export const competitionDivisionsTable = mysqlTable(
   139→	"competition_divisions",
   140→	{
   141→		...commonColumns,
   142→		id: varchar({ length: 255 })
   143→			.primaryKey()
   144→			.$defaultFn(() => createCompetitionDivisionFeeId())
   145→			.notNull(),
   146→		// The competition this division config applies to
   147→		competitionId: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
   148→		// The division (scaling level) this config applies to
   149→		divisionId: varchar({ length: 255 }).notNull(),
   150→		// Fee in cents (e.g., 20000 = $200, 35000 = $350)
   151→		feeCents: int().notNull(),
   152→		// Markdown description explaining who this division is for
   153→		description: text(),
   154→		// Max spots for this division (null = use competition default)
   155→		maxSpots: int(),
   156→	},
   157→	(table) => [
   158→		// Each division can only have one config per competition
   159→		uniqueIndex("competition_divisions_unique_idx").on(
   160→			table.competitionId,
   161→			table.divisionId,
   162→		),
   163→		index("competition_divisions_competition_idx").on(table.competitionId),
   164→	],
   165→)
   166→
   167→// Backward compatibility alias
   168→export const competitionDivisionFeesTable = competitionDivisionsTable
   169→
   170→// Type exports
   171→export type CommerceProduct = InferSelectModel<typeof commerceProductTable>
   172→export type CommercePurchase = InferSelectModel<typeof commercePurchaseTable>
   173→export type CompetitionDivision = InferSelectModel<
   174→	typeof competitionDivisionsTable
   175→>
   176→// Backward compatibility alias
   177→export type CompetitionDivisionFee = CompetitionDivision
   178→
   179→// Relations
   180→export const commerceProductRelations = relations(
   181→	commerceProductTable,
   182→	({ many }) => ({
   183→		purchases: many(commercePurchaseTable),
   184→	}),
   185→)
   186→
   187→export const commercePurchaseRelations = relations(
   188→	commercePurchaseTable,
   189→	({ one }) => ({
   190→		user: one(userTable, {
   191→			fields: [commercePurchaseTable.userId],
   192→			references: [userTable.id],
   193→		}),
   194→		product: one(commerceProductTable, {
   195→			fields: [commercePurchaseTable.productId],
   196→			references: [commerceProductTable.id],
   197→		}),
   198→	}),
   199→)
   200→
   201→export const competitionDivisionsRelations = relations(
   202→	competitionDivisionsTable,
   203→	({ one }) => ({
   204→		competition: one(competitionsTable, {
   205→			fields: [competitionDivisionsTable.competitionId],
   206→			references: [competitionsTable.id],
   207→		}),
   208→		division: one(scalingLevelsTable, {
   209→			fields: [competitionDivisionsTable.divisionId],
   210→			references: [scalingLevelsTable.id],
   211→		}),
   212→	}),
   213→)
   214→
   215→// Backward compatibility alias
   216→export const competitionDivisionFeesRelations = competitionDivisionsRelations

## Summary

I found the route file and all related files for the team registration feature. Here's the complete breakdown:

### 1. Route File: Team Registration

**Path:** `/Users/zacjones/Documents/02.Areas/wodsmith/thewodapp-2/apps/wodsmith-start/src/routes/compete/$slug/teams/$registrationId/index.tsx`

Key highlights:
- Route path: `/compete/$slug/teams/$registrationId`
- Handles both individual (isTeamRegistration=false) and team registrations (isTeamRegistration=true)
- Loader fetches registration details, roster, pending invitations, waivers, registration answers, and division switcher data
- Supports multi-division registration with division switcher for users with multiple registrations
- Parses metadata for per-user affiliates
- Shows welcome modal after invite acceptance

### 2. Related Registration Server Functions

**Path:** `/Users/zacjones/Documents/02.Areas/wodsmith/thewodapp-2/apps/wodsmith-start/src/server-fns/registration-fns.ts`

Key functions:
- `initiateRegistrationPaymentFn` - Handles multi-division registration with payment initiation (FREE or PAID)
- `getTeamRosterFn` - Loads team roster with members, pending invites, and registration metadata
- `getRegistrationDetailsFn` - Gets registration details including competition, division, and payment info
- `updateRegistrationAffiliateFn` - Updates per-user affiliate in registration metadata
- `getUserAffiliateNameFn` - Gets user's default affiliate
- `getScalingGroupWithLevelsFn` - Gets division options
- `getUserCompetitionRegistrationFn` / `getUserCompetitionRegistrationsFn` - Checks registrations

**Path:** `/Users/zacjones/Documents/02.Areas/wodsmith/thewodapp-2/apps/wodsmith-start/src/server-fns/competition-detail-fns.ts`

Key functions:
- `getUserCompetitionRegistrationsFn` - Gets ALL user registrations for a competition (supports multi-division)
- `getCompetitionRegistrationsFn` - Gets all registrations for a competition
- `getOrganizerRegistrationsFn` - Gets registrations with full user/division/team details for organizer view

### 3. Database Schemas

**Competition Registrations Table** (`competitionRegistrationsTable`)
- Fields: id, eventId (competition), userId, divisionId, teamName, captainUserId, athleteTeamId
- Team support: pendingTeammates (JSON), metadata (JSON with per-user affiliates)
- Payment: commercePurchaseId, paymentStatus, paidAt
- Unique constraint: one registration per user per competition
- Relations: competition, user, division, athleteTeam, teamMember, heatAssignments

**Divisions (Scaling Levels)** (`scalingLevelsTable`)
- Fields: id, scalingGroupId, label, position, teamSize (1=individual, 2+=team)
- Relations: scalingGroup, workoutDescriptions

**Competition Divisions** (`competitionDivisionsTable`)
- Fields: competitionId, divisionId, feeCents, description, maxSpots
- Per-competition division config (fees, descriptions, capacity)
- Unique constraint: one config per competition + division

**Registered Page** (`/compete/$slug/registered.tsx`) - **Recently Modified**
- Changed to support multi-division display
- Returns array of items (registrations) instead of single registration
- Each item shows: registrationId, divisionLabel
- Maps to individual registration pages for each division the user registered for
- Shows share card/banner for each division with "View Registration" link

**Key Architecture:**
- Multi-division support: users can register for multiple divisions in single checkout
- Affiliate storage: per-user in registration.metadata.affiliates[userId]
- Payment model: purchase per division, combined checkout session
- Team support: athleteTeamId links to team_membership records
- Division capacity: stored per competition division with maxSpots

All files are at the absolute paths shown above.
